rationale: FEEDBACK required due to gathering_status='partial_honesty_abort' (Guard #5) causing all evidence fields to be null (ABSENT SIGNAL). The Player's report describes a complete implementation with 5 passing tests, but git status and file existence checks contradict these claims - the implementation files were not actually created or modified this turn.
